hintDisplay: Sujeto: Los jugadores lesionados / Verbo: ser reemplazado (voz pasiva) / Complemento: por el entrenador / Tiempo: durante el partido
spanishSentence: Los jugadores lesionados son reemplazados por el entrenador durante el partido.
correctSentence: The injured players are replaced by the coach during the match.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: El partido / Verbo: ser (pasiva) / Complemento: cancelado / Complemento: debido al mal tiempo
spanishSentence: El partido será cancelado debido al mal tiempo
correctSentence: The match will be cancelled due to bad weather.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: la federación / Verbo: cambiar (presente continuo pasivo) / Complemento: las reglas / Tiempo: esta temporada
spanishSentence: Las reglas están siendo cambiadas por la federación esta temporada.
correctSentence: The rules are being changed by the federation this season.

correctSentence: The game had not been replayed before the final decision was made.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: el jugador / Verbo: ser (voz pasiva con estar) / Verbo: transferir (participio pasado) / Complemento: a un nuevo club / Tiempo: este mes

correctSentence: The player is being transferred to a new club this month.

correctSentence: The stadium was built in 1995 by a renowned architect.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: El trofeo / Verbo: Ganar (presente perfecto pasivo) / Complemento: Por nuestro equipo / Complemento: Tres veces / Tiempo: Esta temporada

correctSentence: The trophy has been won by our team three times this season.

correctSentence: The goal will be disallowed by the referee due to an offside position.

correctSentence: The rules were enforced by the referee during the match yesterday.

hints: Tiempo: después del partido del campeonato

correctSentence: The trophy must be displayed in the stadium after the championship match.

correctSentence: The match could be won by our team with a strong strategy.

correctSentence: The stadium is not going to be renovated next season.

correctSentence: The trophy is awarded to the winning team every season.
